solution:
Require Import Stdlib.Lists.List.
Import ListNotations.
Require Import Stdlib.Strings.Ascii.
Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.

(* === Regular expression type === *)

Inductive reg_exp (T : Type) : Type :=
| EmptySet
| EmptyStr
| Char (t : T)
| App (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Union (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Star (r : reg_exp T).

Arguments EmptySet {T}.
Arguments EmptyStr {T}.
Arguments Char {T} _.
Arguments App {T} _ _.
Arguments Union {T} _ _.
Arguments Star {T} _.

(* === Match relation === *)

Reserved Notation "s =~ re" (at level 80).

Inductive exp_match {T} : list T -> reg_exp T -> Prop :=
| MEmpty : [] =~ EmptyStr
| MChar  : forall x, [x] =~ (Char x)
| MApp   : forall s1 re1 s2 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s2 =~ re2 -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (App re1 re2)
| MUnionL : forall s1 re1 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s1 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MUnionR : forall s2 re1 re2,
    s2 =~ re2 -> s2 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MStar0  : forall re, [] =~ (Star re)
| MStarApp : forall s1 s2 re,
    s1 =~ re -> s2 =~ (Star re) -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (Star re)
where "s =~ re" := (exp_match s re).

(* === Reflection === *)

Inductive reflect (P : Prop) : bool -> Prop :=
| ReflectT (H :   P) : reflect P true
| ReflectF (H : ~ P) : reflect P false.

(* === String as list of ascii === *)

Definition string := list ascii.

(* === Given helper lemmas (proofs provided) === *)

Lemma provable_equiv_true : forall (P : Prop),
  P -> (P <-> True).
Proof. intros. split. - intros. constructor. - intros _. apply H. Qed.

Lemma not_equiv_false : forall (P : Prop),
  ~ P -> (P <-> False).
Proof. intros. split. - apply H. - intros. destruct H0. Qed.

Lemma null_matches_none : forall (s : string),
  (s =~ EmptySet) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma empty_matches_eps : forall (s : string),
  s =~ EmptyStr <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MEmpty.
Qed.

Lemma empty_nomatch_ne : forall (a : ascii) s,
  (a :: s =~ EmptyStr) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma char_nomatch_char : forall (a b : ascii) s,
  b <> a -> (b :: s =~ Char a <-> False).
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. apply H.
  inversion H0. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma char_eps_suffix : forall (a : ascii) s,
  a :: s =~ Char a <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MChar.
Qed.

Lemma app_exists : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros. inversion H. exists s1, s2. split.
    * reflexivity.
    * split. apply H3. apply H4.
  - intros [s0 [s1 [Happ [Hmat0 Hmat1]]]].
    rewrite Happ. apply (MApp s0 _ s1 _ Hmat0 Hmat1).
Qed.

Lemma union_disj : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (Union re0 re1) <-> s =~ re0 \/ s =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros H. inversion H; subst.
    + left. assumption.
    + right. assumption.
  - intros [H | H].
    + apply MUnionL. apply H.
    + apply MUnionR. apply H.
Qed.

(* === Exercises: lemmas to prove === *)

Lemma app_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re0 re1,
  a :: s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  ([] =~ re0 /\ a :: s =~ re1) \/
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros a s re0 re1. split.
  - intro H. apply app_exists in H.
    destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H0 H1]]]].
    destruct s0 as [| x s0'].
    + simpl in Heq. subst s1. left. split; assumption.
    + simpl in Heq. injection Heq as Hx Hs. subst.
      right. exists s0', s1. split.
      * reflexivity.
      * split; assumption.
  - intros [[H0 H1] | [s0 [s1 [Heq [H0 H1]]]]].
    + exact (MApp [] re0 (a :: s) re1 H0 H1).
    + subst s. exact (MApp (a :: s0) re0 s1 re1 H0 H1).
Qed.

(* Proves that a non-empty string matches Star re iff it can be split into a non-empty prefix matching re and a suffix matching Star re. *)
Lemma star_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re,
  a :: s =~ Star re <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re /\ s1 =~ Star re.
Proof.
  intros a s re. split.
  - intro H. remember (a :: s) as s'. remember (Star re) as re'.
    induction H as [ | | | | | | s1 s2 re0 Hmatch1 IH1 Hmatch2 IH2 ]; try discriminate.
    injection Heqre' as Hre. subst.
    destruct s1 as [|x s1'].
    + simpl in Heqs'. apply IH2.
      * exact Heqs'.
      * reflexivity.
    + simpl in Heqs'. injection Heqs' as Hx Hs. subst.
      exists s1', s2. split.
      * reflexivity.
      * split; assumption.
  - intros [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
    subst s. exact (MStarApp (a :: s0) s1 re H1 H2).
Qed.

(* === Spec definitions === *)

Definition refl_matches_eps m :=
  forall re : reg_exp ascii, reflect ([] =~ re) (m re).

Definition is_der re (a : ascii) re' :=
  forall s, a :: s =~ re <-> s =~ re'.

Definition derives d :=
  forall a re, is_der re a (d a re).

Definition matches_regex m : Prop :=
  forall (s : string) re, reflect (s =~ re) (m s re).

(* === Functions to implement === *)

(* Determines if the empty string matches the given regular expression 
   by recursively evaluating the nullability of each subexpression. *)
Fixpoint match_eps (re : reg_exp ascii) : bool :=
  match re with
  | EmptySet => false
  | EmptyStr => true
  | Char _ => false
  | App r1 r2 => andb (match_eps r1) (match_eps r2)
  | Union r1 r2 => orb (match_eps r1) (match_eps r2)
  | Star _ => true
  end.

(* Computes the Brzozowski derivative of a regular expression with respect to a character. *)
Fixpoint derive (a : ascii) (re : reg_exp ascii) : reg_exp ascii :=
  match re with
  | EmptySet => EmptySet
  | EmptyStr => EmptySet
  | Char c => if ascii_dec a c then EmptyStr else EmptySet
  | App r1 r2 =>
      if match_eps r1
      then Union (App (derive a r1) r2) (derive a r2)
      else App (derive a r1) r2
  | Union r1 r2 => Union (derive a r1) (derive a r2)
  | Star r => App (derive a r) (Star r)
  end.

Fixpoint regex_match (s : string) (re : reg_exp ascii) : bool :=
  match s with
  | [] => match_eps re
  | a :: s' => regex_match s' (derive a re)
  end.

(* === Theorems to prove === *)

Theorem match_eps_refl : refl_matches_eps match_eps.
Proof.
  unfold refl_matches_eps.
  intros re. induction re; simpl.
  - apply ReflectF. intro H. inversion H.
  - apply ReflectT. apply MEmpty.
  - apply ReflectF. intro H. inversion H.
  - destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2]; simpl.
    + apply ReflectT. exact (MApp [] re1 [] re2 H1 H2).
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply app_exists in H. destruct H as [[|?] [[|?] [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]]; try discriminate Heq; auto.
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply app_exists in H. destruct H as [[|?] [[|?] [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]]; try discriminate Heq; auto.
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply app_exists in H. destruct H as [[|?] [[|?] [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]]; try discriminate Heq; auto.
  - destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2]; simpl.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. exact H1.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. exact H1.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionR. exact H2.
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply union_disj in H. destruct H as [H|H]; auto.
  - apply ReflectT. apply MStar0.
Qed.

(* Proves the Brzozowski derivative correctness theorem *)
Theorem derive_corr : derives derive.
Proof.
  unfold derives, is_der.
  intros a re. induction re; intros s; simpl.
  - split; intro H; apply null_matches_none in H; contradiction.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply empty_nomatch_ne in H; contradiction.
    + apply null_matches_none in H; contradiction.
  - destruct (ascii_dec a t) as [Heq | Hneq].
    + subst. split; intro H.
      * apply char_eps_suffix in H. apply empty_matches_eps. exact H.
      * apply empty_matches_eps in H. apply char_eps_suffix. exact H.
    + split; intro H.
      * apply (char_nomatch_char t a s Hneq) in H. contradiction.
      * apply null_matches_none in H. contradiction.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply app_ne in H.
      destruct (match_eps_refl re1) as [Heps | Hneps].
      * apply union_disj. destruct H as [[H1 H2] | [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]]].
        -- right. apply IHre2. exact H2.
        -- left. apply app_exists. exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre1 |]; auto.
      * destruct H as [[H1 H2] | [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]]].
        -- contradiction.
        -- apply app_exists. exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre1 |]; auto.
    + apply app_ne.
      destruct (match_eps_refl re1) as [Heps | Hneps].
      * apply union_disj in H. destruct H as [H | H].
        -- right. apply app_exists in H. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
           exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre1 |]; auto.
        -- left. split; [exact Heps | apply IHre2; exact H].
      * right. apply app_exists in H. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
        exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre1 |]; auto.
  - split; intro H; apply union_disj in H; apply union_disj; destruct H as [H | H].
    + left. apply IHre1. exact H.
    + right. apply IHre2. exact H.
    + left. apply IHre1. exact H.
    + right. apply IHre2. exact H.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply star_ne in H. apply app_exists. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
      exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre |]; auto.
    + apply app_exists in H. apply star_ne. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
      exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre |]; auto.
Qed.

Theorem regex_match_correct : matches_regex regex_match.
Proof.
  unfold matches_regex.
  intros s. induction s as [| a s' IH].
  - intros re. simpl. apply match_eps_refl.
  - intros re. simpl. destruct (IH (derive a re)) as [H|H].
    + apply ReflectT. destruct (derive_corr a re s') as [_ H2]. apply H2. exact H.
    + apply ReflectF. intro Hcontra. apply H. destruct (derive_corr a re s') as [H1 _]. apply H1. exact Hcontra.
Qed.

diff_user_message.system:
You are an expert Coq proof engineer performing correct-by-construction
synthesis: simultaneously building an implementation AND its proof of
correctness.

## Goal

The .v file contains:
- `Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.` — typed hole for unfinished expressions
- A function signature with `todo` as the body.
- A lemma stating the specification of the function which is `Admitted.` —
  placeholder for an unfinished proof.

Your goal: fill every `todo`, and prove every lemma marked `Admitted.` with
`Qed.` After your edit, the file MUST compile with `coqc`. In particular, the
function should be fully implemented, and the lemma should prove its correctness.

We want to synthesize the program and generate its proof step by step in the
deductive synthesis style. You will be called multiple times. You are STRICTLY
FORBIDDEN from taking multiple steps or generating the full solution in one call.

In each call, **replace exactly one `todo` with an expression and prove its
corresponding lemma**. Fill a `todo` with one concrete expression:
   - A value: `true`, `0`, `nil`, etc.
   - A pattern match: `match x with | C1 => todo | C2 y => todo end`
   - A conditional: `if cond then todo else todo`
   - A recursive or function call
   Note that all the sub-expressions are `todo`.
   Leave all other `todo`s untouched.
   Add sub-lemmas (with appropriate preconditions) for any new `todo`
   expression, and declare them as `Admitted.` If the expression is a leaf,
   no new sub-lemma is declared.
   Use the sub-lemmas to prove the lemma for the filled `todo` expression
   (`Admitted.` → `Qed.`).
   Example: `Definition f : (nat -> bool) := todo.` becomes
   `Fixpoint f (n : nat) : bool := match n with | O => todo | S m => todo end.`
   and the main lemma for `f` is proved by induction using the sub-lemmas for
   the `todo`s in the base and inductive cases, which are declared `Admitted.`

If there are standalone `Admitted.` lemmas with no corresponding `todo`
(all expressions already filled), you may prove one such lemma directly.
When choosing which `Admitted.` lemma to prove, prefer ones that do NOT
depend on other `Admitted.` lemmas — prove prerequisites first.

## Proof Strategy

When a proof attempt does not go through, consider:
- `remember` to generalize a term before `induction` or `destruct`
- `generalize dependent` to strengthen the induction hypothesis
- Inducting on evidence (`induction H`) rather than on the term
- Introducing helper lemmas about list/nat structure

## Rules

- The file MUST compile with `coqc` after every edit.
- Do NOT remove or rename existing lemmas/theorems, or change their statements.
  Only fill in proofs.
- Do NOT use `exact todo.` or a similar trivial tactic to close a proof —
  that defeats the purpose. Only close proofs with real tactics.
- Do NOT replace multiple `todo`s in one call.
- Do NOT prove multiple `Admitted.` lemmas in one call.
- Add `Require Import` statements as needed.

## Scoring

score = Qed / (Qed + Admitted + todo).
- Doesn't compile → 0 (you will see the coqc error and can retry).
- Compiles, no Admitted, no todo → 1.0 (done).

You will be called for up to 50 iterations.

```coq
Require Import Stdlib.Lists.List.
Import ListNotations.
Require Import Stdlib.Strings.Ascii.
Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.

(* === Regular expression type === *)

Inductive reg_exp (T : Type) : Type :=
| EmptySet
| EmptyStr
| Char (t : T)
| App (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Union (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Star (r : reg_exp T).

Arguments EmptySet {T}.
Arguments EmptyStr {T}.
Arguments Char {T} _.
Arguments App {T} _ _.
Arguments Union {T} _ _.
Arguments Star {T} _.

(* === Match relation === *)

Reserved Notation "s =~ re" (at level 80).

Inductive exp_match {T} : list T -> reg_exp T -> Prop :=
| MEmpty : [] =~ EmptyStr
| MChar  : forall x, [x] =~ (Char x)
| MApp   : forall s1 re1 s2 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s2 =~ re2 -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (App re1 re2)
| MUnionL : forall s1 re1 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s1 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MUnionR : forall s2 re1 re2,
    s2 =~ re2 -> s2 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MStar0  : forall re, [] =~ (Star re)
| MStarApp : forall s1 s2 re,
    s1 =~ re -> s2 =~ (Star re) -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (Star re)
where "s =~ re" := (exp_match s re).

(* === Reflection === *)

Inductive reflect (P : Prop) : bool -> Prop :=
| ReflectT (H :   P) : reflect P true
| ReflectF (H : ~ P) : reflect P false.

(* === String as list of ascii === *)

Definition string := list ascii.

(* === Given helper lemmas (proofs provided) === *)

Lemma provable_equiv_true : forall (P : Prop),
  P -> (P <-> True).
Proof. intros. split. - intros. constructor. - intros _. apply H. Qed.

Lemma not_equiv_false : forall (P : Prop),
  ~ P -> (P <-> False).
Proof. intros. split. - apply H. - intros. destruct H0. Qed.

Lemma null_matches_none : forall (s : string),
  (s =~ EmptySet) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma empty_matches_eps : forall (s : string),
  s =~ EmptyStr <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MEmpty.
Qed.

Lemma empty_nomatch_ne : forall (a : ascii) s,
  (a :: s =~ EmptyStr) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma char_nomatch_char : forall (a b : ascii) s,
  b <> a -> (b :: s =~ Char a <-> False).
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. apply H.
  inversion H0. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma char_eps_suffix : forall (a : ascii) s,
  a :: s =~ Char a <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MChar.
Qed.

Lemma app_exists : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros. inversion H. exists s1, s2. split.
    * reflexivity.
    * split. apply H3. apply H4.
  - intros [s0 [s1 [Happ [Hmat0 Hmat1]]]].
    rewrite Happ. apply (MApp s0 _ s1 _ Hmat0 Hmat1).
Qed.

Lemma union_disj : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (Union re0 re1) <-> s =~ re0 \/ s =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros H. inversion H; subst.
    + left. assumption.
    + right. assumption.
  - intros [H | H].
    + apply MUnionL. apply H.
    + apply MUnionR. apply H.
Qed.

(* === Exercises: lemmas to prove === *)

Lemma app_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re0 re1,
  a :: s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  ([] =~ re0 /\ a :: s =~ re1) \/
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros a s re0 re1. split.
  - intro H. apply app_exists in H.
    destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H0 H1]]]].
    destruct s0 as [| x s0'].
    + simpl in Heq. subst s1. left. split; assumption.
    + simpl in Heq. injection Heq as Hx Hs. subst.
      right. exists s0', s1. split.
      * reflexivity.
      * split; assumption.
  - intros [[H0 H1] | [s0 [s1 [Heq [H0 H1]]]]].
    + exact (MApp [] re0 (a :: s) re1 H0 H1).
    + subst s. exact (MApp (a :: s0) re0 s1 re1 H0 H1).
Qed.

(* Proves that a non-empty string matches Star re iff it can be split into a non-empty prefix matching re and a suffix matching Star re. *)
Lemma star_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re,
  a :: s =~ Star re <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re /\ s1 =~ Star re.
Proof.
  intros a s re. split.
  - intro H. remember (a :: s) as s'. remember (Star re) as re'.
    induction H as [ | | | | | | s1 s2 re0 Hmatch1 IH1 Hmatch2 IH2 ]; try discriminate.
    injection Heqre' as Hre. subst.
    destruct s1 as [|x s1'].
    + simpl in Heqs'. apply IH2.
      * exact Heqs'.
      * reflexivity.
    + simpl in Heqs'. injection Heqs' as Hx Hs. subst.
      exists s1', s2. split.
      * reflexivity.
      * split; assumption.
  - intros [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
    subst s. exact (MStarApp (a :: s0) s1 re H1 H2).
Qed.

(* === Spec definitions === *)

Definition refl_matches_eps m :=
  forall re : reg_exp ascii, reflect ([] =~ re) (m re).

Definition is_der re (a : ascii) re' :=
  forall s, a :: s =~ re <-> s =~ re'.

Definition derives d :=
  forall a re, is_der re a (d a re).

Definition matches_regex m : Prop :=
  forall (s : string) re, reflect (s =~ re) (m s re).

(* === Functions to implement === *)

Definition match_eps : reg_exp ascii -> bool := todo.

Definition derive : ascii -> reg_exp ascii -> reg_exp ascii := todo.

Definition regex_match : string -> reg_exp ascii -> bool := todo.

(* === Theorems to prove === *)

Theorem match_eps_refl : refl_matches_eps match_eps.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem derive_corr : derives derive.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem regex_match_correct : matches_regex regex_match.
Proof. Admitted.

```

```coq
Require Import Stdlib.Lists.List.
Import ListNotations.
Require Import Stdlib.Strings.Ascii.
Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.

(* === Regular expression type === *)

Inductive reg_exp (T : Type) : Type :=
| EmptySet
| EmptyStr
| Char (t : T)
| App (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Union (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Star (r : reg_exp T).

Arguments EmptySet {T}.
Arguments EmptyStr {T}.
Arguments Char {T} _.
Arguments App {T} _ _.
Arguments Union {T} _ _.
Arguments Star {T} _.

(* === Match relation === *)

Reserved Notation "s =~ re" (at level 80).

Inductive exp_match {T} : list T -> reg_exp T -> Prop :=
| MEmpty : [] =~ EmptyStr
| MChar  : forall x, [x] =~ (Char x)
| MApp   : forall s1 re1 s2 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s2 =~ re2 -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (App re1 re2)
| MUnionL : forall s1 re1 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s1 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MUnionR : forall s2 re1 re2,
    s2 =~ re2 -> s2 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MStar0  : forall re, [] =~ (Star re)
| MStarApp : forall s1 s2 re,
    s1 =~ re -> s2 =~ (Star re) -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (Star re)
where "s =~ re" := (exp_match s re).

(* === Reflection === *)

Inductive reflect (P : Prop) : bool -> Prop :=
| ReflectT (H :   P) : reflect P true
| ReflectF (H : ~ P) : reflect P false.

(* === String as list of ascii === *)

Definition string := list ascii.

(* === Given helper lemmas (proofs provided) === *)

Lemma provable_equiv_true : forall (P : Prop),
  P -> (P <-> True).
Proof. intros. split. - intros. constructor. - intros _. apply H. Qed.

Lemma not_equiv_false : forall (P : Prop),
  ~ P -> (P <-> False).
Proof. intros. split. - apply H. - intros. destruct H0. Qed.

Lemma null_matches_none : forall (s : string),
  (s =~ EmptySet) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma empty_matches_eps : forall (s : string),
  s =~ EmptyStr <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MEmpty.
Qed.

Lemma empty_nomatch_ne : forall (a : ascii) s,
  (a :: s =~ EmptyStr) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma char_nomatch_char : forall (a b : ascii) s,
  b <> a -> (b :: s =~ Char a <-> False).
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. apply H.
  inversion H0. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma char_eps_suffix : forall (a : ascii) s,
  a :: s =~ Char a <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MChar.
Qed.

Lemma app_exists : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros. inversion H. exists s1, s2. split.
    * reflexivity.
    * split. apply H3. apply H4.
  - intros [s0 [s1 [Happ [Hmat0 Hmat1]]]].
    rewrite Happ. apply (MApp s0 _ s1 _ Hmat0 Hmat1).
Qed.

Lemma union_disj : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (Union re0 re1) <-> s =~ re0 \/ s =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros H. inversion H; subst.
    + left. assumption.
    + right. assumption.
  - intros [H | H].
    + apply MUnionL. apply H.
    + apply MUnionR. apply H.
Qed.

(* === Exercises: lemmas to prove === *)

Lemma app_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re0 re1,
  a :: s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  ([] =~ re0 /\ a :: s =~ re1) \/
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros a s re0 re1. split.
  - intro H. apply app_exists in H.
    destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H0 H1]]]].
    destruct s0 as [| x s0'].
    + simpl in Heq. subst s1. left. split; assumption.
    + simpl in Heq. injection Heq as Hx Hs. subst.
      right. exists s0', s1. split.
      * reflexivity.
      * split; assumption.
  - intros [[H0 H1] | [s0 [s1 [Heq [H0 H1]]]]].
    + exact (MApp [] re0 (a :: s) re1 H0 H1).
    + subst s. exact (MApp (a :: s0) re0 s1 re1 H0 H1).
Qed.

(* Proves that a non-empty string matches Star re iff it can be split into a non-empty prefix matching re and a suffix matching Star re. *)
Lemma star_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re,
  a :: s =~ Star re <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re /\ s1 =~ Star re.
Proof.
  intros a s re. split.
  - intro H. remember (a :: s) as s'. remember (Star re) as re'.
    induction H as [ | | | | | | s1 s2 re0 Hmatch1 IH1 Hmatch2 IH2 ]; try discriminate.
    injection Heqre' as Hre. subst.
    destruct s1 as [|x s1'].
    + simpl in Heqs'. apply IH2.
      * exact Heqs'.
      * reflexivity.
    + simpl in Heqs'. injection Heqs' as Hx Hs. subst.
      exists s1', s2. split.
      * reflexivity.
      * split; assumption.
  - intros [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
    subst s. exact (MStarApp (a :: s0) s1 re H1 H2).
Qed.

(* === Spec definitions === *)

Definition refl_matches_eps m :=
  forall re : reg_exp ascii, reflect ([] =~ re) (m re).

Definition is_der re (a : ascii) re' :=
  forall s, a :: s =~ re <-> s =~ re'.

Definition derives d :=
  forall a re, is_der re a (d a re).

Definition matches_regex m : Prop :=
  forall (s : string) re, reflect (s =~ re) (m s re).

(* === Functions to implement === *)

(* Determines if the empty string matches the given regular expression 
   by recursively evaluating the nullability of each subexpression. *)
Fixpoint match_eps (re : reg_exp ascii) : bool :=
  match re with
  | EmptySet => false
  | EmptyStr => true
  | Char _ => false
  | App r1 r2 => andb (match_eps r1) (match_eps r2)
  | Union r1 r2 => orb (match_eps r1) (match_eps r2)
  | Star _ => true
  end.

(* Computes the Brzozowski derivative of a regular expression with respect to a character. *)
Fixpoint derive (a : ascii) (re : reg_exp ascii) : reg_exp ascii :=
  match re with
  | EmptySet => EmptySet
  | EmptyStr => EmptySet
  | Char c => if ascii_dec a c then EmptyStr else EmptySet
  | App r1 r2 =>
      if match_eps r1
      then Union (App (derive a r1) r2) (derive a r2)
      else App (derive a r1) r2
  | Union r1 r2 => Union (derive a r1) (derive a r2)
  | Star r => App (derive a r) (Star r)
  end.

Fixpoint regex_match (s : string) (re : reg_exp ascii) : bool :=
  match s with
  | [] => match_eps re
  | a :: s' => regex_match s' (derive a re)
  end.

(* === Theorems to prove === *)

Theorem match_eps_refl : refl_matches_eps match_eps.
Proof.
  unfold refl_matches_eps.
  intros re. induction re.
  - simpl. apply ReflectF. intro H. inversion H.
  - simpl. apply ReflectT. apply MEmpty.
  - simpl. apply ReflectF. intro H. inversion H.
  - simpl. destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2]; simpl.
    + apply ReflectT. exact (MApp [] re1 [] re2 H1 H2).
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply app_exists in H.
      destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]].
      destruct s0; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      destruct s1; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      apply H2. assumption.
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply app_exists in H.
      destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]].
      destruct s0; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      destruct s1; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      apply H1. assumption.
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply app_exists in H.
      destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]].
      destruct s0; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      destruct s1; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      apply H1. assumption.
  - simpl. destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2]; simpl.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. exact H1.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. exact H1.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionR. exact H2.
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply union_disj in H.
      destruct H as [H|H].
      * apply H1. assumption.
      * apply H2. assumption.
  - simpl. apply ReflectT. apply MStar0.
Qed.

Theorem derive_corr : derives derive.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem regex_match_correct : matches_regex regex_match.
Proof.
  unfold matches_regex.
  intros s. induction s as [| a s' IH].
  - intros re. simpl. apply match_eps_refl.
  - intros re. simpl. destruct (IH (derive a re)) as [H|H].
    + apply ReflectT. destruct (derive_corr a re s') as [_ H2]. apply H2. exact H.
    + apply ReflectF. intro Hcontra. apply H. destruct (derive_corr a re s') as [H1 _]. apply H1. exact Hcontra.
Qed.
```

```coq
Require Import Stdlib.Lists.List.
Import ListNotations.
Require Import Stdlib.Strings.Ascii.

(* === Regular expression type === *)

Inductive reg_exp (T : Type) : Type :=
| EmptySet
| EmptyStr
| Char (t : T)
| App (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Union (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Star (r : reg_exp T).

Arguments EmptySet {T}.
Arguments EmptyStr {T}.
Arguments Char {T} _.
Arguments App {T} _ _.
Arguments Union {T} _ _.
Arguments Star {T} _.

(* === Match relation === *)

Reserved Notation "s =~ re" (at level 80).

Inductive exp_match {T} : list T -> reg_exp T -> Prop :=
| MEmpty : [] =~ EmptyStr
| MChar  : forall x, [x] =~ (Char x)
| MApp   : forall s1 re1 s2 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s2 =~ re2 -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (App re1 re2)
| MUnionL : forall s1 re1 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s1 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MUnionR : forall s2 re1 re2,
    s2 =~ re2 -> s2 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MStar0  : forall re, [] =~ (Star re)
| MStarApp : forall s1 s2 re,
    s1 =~ re -> s2 =~ (Star re) -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (Star re)
where "s =~ re" := (exp_match s re).

(* === Spec definitions === *)

Definition refl_matches_eps m :=
  forall re : reg_exp ascii, reflect ([] =~ re) (m re).

Definition is_der re (a : ascii) re' :=
  forall s, a :: s =~ re <-> s =~ re'.

Definition derives d :=
  forall a re, is_der re a (d a re).

Definition matches_regex m : Prop :=
  forall (s : string) re, reflect (s =~ re) (m s re).

(* === Functions to implement === *)

(* Determines if the empty string matches the given regular expression 
   by recursively evaluating the nullability of each subexpression. *)
Fixpoint match_eps (re : reg_exp ascii) : bool :=
  match re with
  | EmptySet => false
  | EmptyStr => true
  | Char _ => false
  | App r1 r2 => andb (match_eps r1) (match_eps r2)
  | Union r1 r2 => orb (match_eps r1) (match_eps r2)
  | Star _ => true
  end.

(* Computes the Brzozowski derivative of a regular expression with respect to a character. *)
Fixpoint derive (a : ascii) (re : reg_exp ascii) : reg_exp ascii :=
  match re with
  | EmptySet => EmptySet
  | EmptyStr => EmptySet
  | Char c => if ascii_dec a c then EmptyStr else EmptySet
  | App r1 r2 =>
      if match_eps r1
      then Union (App (derive a r1) r2) (derive a r2)
      else App (derive a r1) r2
  | Union r1 r2 => Union (derive a r1) (derive a r2)
  | Star r => App (derive a r) (Star r)
  end.

Fixpoint regex_match (s : string) (re : reg_exp ascii) : bool :=
  match s with
  | [] => match_eps re
  | a :: s' => regex_match s' (derive a re)
  end.

(* === Theorems to prove === *)

Theorem match_eps_refl : refl_matches_eps match_eps.
Proof.
  unfold refl_matches_eps.
  intros re. induction re.
  - simpl. apply ReflectF. intro H. inversion H.
  - simpl. apply ReflectT. apply MEmpty.
  - simpl. apply ReflectF. intro H. inversion H.
  - simpl. destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2]; simpl.

    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply app_exists in H.
      destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]].
      destruct s0; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      destruct s1; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      apply H2. assumption.

      destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]].
      destruct s0; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      destruct s1; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      apply H1. assumption.

      destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]].
      destruct s0; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      destruct s1; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      apply H1. assumption.
  - simpl. destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2]; simpl.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. exact H1.

(* Proves the Brzozowski derivative correctness theorem *)
Theorem derive_corr : derives derive.
Proof.
  unfold derives, is_der.
  intros a re. induction re; intros s; simpl.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply null_matches_none in H. destruct H.
    + apply null_matches_none in H. destruct H.

      * apply empty_matches_eps in H. apply char_eps_suffix. exact H.
    + split; intro H.

      * apply null_matches_none in H. destruct H.

        exists s0, s1. split. exact Heq. split. apply IHre1. exact H1. exact H2.

    + apply union_disj in H. apply union_disj. destruct H as [H | H].
      * left. apply IHre1. exact H.
      * right. apply IHre2. exact H.

      exists s0, s1. split. exact Heq. split. apply IHre. exact H1. exact H2.
Qed.

Theorem regex_match_correct : matches_regex regex_match.
Proof.
  unfold matches_regex.
```

Theorem match_eps_refl : refl_matches_eps match_eps.

  - simpl. destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2]; simpl.

      destruct s1; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      apply H2. assumption.
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply app_exists in H.

      destruct s0; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      destruct s1; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      apply H1. assumption.
    + apply ReflectF. intro H. apply app_exists in H.
      destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hmat1 Hmat2]]]].
      destruct s0; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      destruct s1; simpl in Heq; try discriminate Heq.
      apply H1. assumption.
  - simpl. destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2]; simpl.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. exact H1.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. exact H1.

(* Proves the Brzozowski derivative correctness theorem *)
Theorem derive_corr : derives derive.
Proof.
  unfold derives, is_der.
  intros a re. induction re; intros s; simpl.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply null_matches_none in H. destruct H.
    + apply null_matches_none in H. destruct H.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply empty_nomatch_ne in H. destruct H.
    + apply null_matches_none in H. destruct H.
  - destruct (ascii_dec a t) as [Heq | Hneq].
    + subst. split; intro H.
      * apply char_eps_suffix in H. apply empty_matches_eps. exact H.
      * apply empty_matches_eps in H. apply char_eps_suffix. exact H.
    + split; intro H.
      * apply (char_nomatch_char t a s Hneq) in H. destruct H.
      * apply null_matches_none in H. destruct H.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply app_ne in H.
      destruct (match_eps_refl re1) as [Heps | Hneps].
      * apply union_disj. destruct H as [[H1 H2] | H3].
        -- right. apply IHre2. exact H2.
        -- left. apply app_exists. destruct H3 as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
           exists s0, s1. split. exact Heq. split. apply IHre1. exact H1. exact H2.
      * destruct H as [[H1 H2] | H3].
        -- apply Hneps in H1. destruct H1.
        -- apply app_exists. destruct H3 as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
           exists s0, s1. split. exact Heq. split. apply IHre1. exact H1. exact H2.
    + apply app_ne.
      destruct (match_eps_refl re1) as [Heps | Hneps].
      * apply union_disj in H. destruct H as [H | H].
        -- right. apply app_exists in H. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
           exists s0, s1. split. exact Heq. split. apply IHre1. exact H1. exact H2.
        -- left. split. exact Heps. apply IHre2. exact H.
      * right. apply app_exists in H. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
        exists s0, s1. split. exact Heq. split. apply IHre1. exact H1. exact H2.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply union_disj in H. apply union_disj. destruct H as [H | H].
      * left. apply IHre1. exact H.
      * right. apply IHre2. exact H.
    + apply union_disj in H. apply union_disj. destruct H as [H | H].
      * left. apply IHre1. exact H.
      * right. apply IHre2. exact H.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply star_ne in H. apply app_exists. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
      exists s0, s1. split. exact Heq. split. apply IHre. exact H1. exact H2.
    + apply app_exists in H. apply star_ne. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
      exists s0, s1. split. exact Heq. split. apply IHre. exact H1. exact H2.
Qed.

(* Proves the Brzozowski derivative correctness theorem *)
Theorem derive_corr : derives derive.
Proof.
  unfold derives, is_der.
  intros a re. induction re; intros s; simpl.
  - split; intro H; apply null_matches_none in H; contradiction.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply empty_nomatch_ne in H; contradiction.
    + apply null_matches_none in H; contradiction.
  - destruct (ascii_dec a t) as [Heq | Hneq].
    + subst. split; intro H.
      * apply char_eps_suffix in H. apply empty_matches_eps. exact H.
      * apply empty_matches_eps in H. apply char_eps_suffix. exact H.
    + split; intro H.
      * apply (char_nomatch_char t a s Hneq) in H. contradiction.
      * apply null_matches_none in H. contradiction.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply app_ne in H.
      destruct (match_eps_refl re1) as [Heps | Hneps].
      * apply union_disj. destruct H as [[H1 H2] | [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]]].
        -- right. apply IHre2. exact H2.
        -- left. apply app_exists. exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre1 |]; auto.
      * destruct H as [[H1 H2] | [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]]].
        -- contradiction.
        -- apply app_exists. exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre1 |]; auto.
    + apply app_ne.
      destruct (match_eps_refl re1) as [Heps | Hneps].
      * apply union_disj in H. destruct H as [H | H].
        -- right. apply app_exists in H. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
           exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre1 |]; auto.
        -- left. split; [exact Heps | apply IHre2; exact H].
      * right. apply app_exists in H. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
        exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre1 |]; auto.
  - split; intro H; apply union_disj in H; apply union_disj; destruct H as [H | H].
    + left. apply IHre1. exact H.
    + right. apply IHre2. exact H.
    + left. apply IHre1. exact H.
    + right. apply IHre2. exact H.
  - split; intro H.
    + apply star_ne in H. apply app_exists. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
      exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre |]; auto.
    + apply app_exists in H. apply star_ne. destruct H as [s0 [s1 [Heq [H1 H2]]]].
      exists s0, s1. split; auto. split; [apply IHre |]; auto.
Qed.
